titleStmt.title: SII 4.676: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 676. (A.R. No. 226 of 1892). ON THE SAME PILLAR.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:

gaparńĀkramakramakhaŠĻáiŠł• paŠłćlńĀbhidhńĀnaŠł• kritńę [. 1*] ArundhatńęvńĀsya

madhńďnurvvńďnnńĀŠĻĀbikńĀ rńĀjabhŠĻõtŇćŠĻĀbikńďva [. 2*] tasyńĀŠĻĀ ca tasmńĀjjagadutsavńĀ

tńĀŠĻĀŇõubhissammitńď ŇõrńęnńĀdiŠĻĀŠłćlanivńĀsinńď purabhidńď kaŠĻĀdarppadarppacchidńď .

rŠĻ£aŠĻĀbulu 1073 gunńďŠĻĀŠĻ≠i UttarńĀyaŠĻáasaŠĻĀkrńĀŠĻĀttinimittamu
na nńĀpastaŠĻĀbakulatilakuŠĻĀŠłćunu mudgalagŇćtruŠĻĀŠłćunaina pńĀmalŇęri .

lu 55 . vńęniŠĻĀ jńďkoni ńÄcakamńĀreyallaŠĻĀŠłću kńĀmanabŇćyu koŠłćuku kńĀ
me dana putrńĀnu pautrika mńĀcaŠĻĀdrńĀrkkamu nitya mńĀneŠĻĀŠłću neyi di

Digital edition of SII 4.676 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
